sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91123" key="pternobate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερνο-βᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n91123.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk on one's heels</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
